title: 06 — Ads Revenue
description: Ad platform performance: CPC/CPM revenue, auction metrics, campaign health, budget burn rates. Primary audience: Growth & Monetisation team.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_spent), 0) FROM ad_campaigns WHERE DATE(updated_at) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ad_campaigns WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ad_impressions WHERE clicked = true AND DATE(clicked_at) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN clicked THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) FROM ad_impressions WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ad_campaigns WHERE status = 'BUDGET_EXHAUSTED' AND DATE(updated_at) = CURRENT_DATE

panels.title: Ad Revenue Over Time (CPC vs CPM)
panels.description: CPC = performance-based revenue (user clicked). CPM = brand awareness (impression served).

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', ai.created_at) as time, SUM(CASE WHEN c.bidding_model = 'CPC' AND ai.clicked THEN c.max_bid_vnd ELSE 0 END) as cpc_revenue, SUM(CASE WHEN c.bidding_model = 'CPM' THEN c.max_bid_vnd / 1000.0 ELSE 0 END) as cpm_revenue FROM ad_impressions ai JOIN ad_campaigns c ON c.id = ai.campaign_id WHERE ai.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT name, total_spent FROM ad_campaigns WHERE status IN ('ACTIVE', 'BUDGET_EXHAUSTED') ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) as time, COUNT(*) as impressions, SUM(CASE WHEN clicked THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as clicks FROM ad_impressions WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Subscription MRR (Monthly Recurring Revenue)
panels.description: WHY track here: Ads + Subscriptions = platform revenue. Compare MRR trend vs ad revenue.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) as time, SUM(last_paid_vnd) as mrr FROM seller_subscriptions WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Subscription Plan Distribution
panels.description: Sellers per plan tier. Upgrade rate from FREE→BASIC→PROFESSIONAL indicates platform value.

targets.rawSql: SELECT plan_tier, COUNT(*) as sellers FROM seller_subscriptions WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY plan_tier
